headline: Simon Property (SPG) Up 3% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
summary: Simon Property (SPG) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Simon Property Group, Raises Price Target to $207
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Ronald Kamdem   maintains Simon Property Group (NYSE:SPG) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $205 to $207.
